title: La Colline Aquatic Center - Chicoutimi
meta: Aquatic Center Renovation & Arena Expansion | City of Saguenay (2025)
description: New outdoor aquatic facility and expansion of the municipal arena.
longDescription:
Complex demolition and reconstruction project of a state-of-the-art outdoor aquatic basin for the City of Saguenay, integrated with a major structural expansion of the existing sports arena to house modern athletic changing facilities.
Design Phase: 2023
Construction Phase: 2025

title: Duchesnay Resort Main Welcome Pavilion
description: Major structural rehabilitation and complete spatial redesign of the primary hospitality pavilion.
longDescription: Mandate for a major rehabilitation, structural overhaul, and comprehensive spatial redesign of the primary welcome pavilion at the prestigious Duchesnay Tourist Resort managed by the SEPAQ. The project focus lies on optimizing spatial flow and elevating the high-end guest arrival experience.

title: Athletic Complex at Pointe-Lévy High School
meta: Expansion Mandate | CSSDN & City of Lévis (2024)
description: Redevelopment of Pointe-Lévy school facilities and construction of a new double gymnasium and gymnastics center.
longDescription: Comprehensive feasibility study and design development for the extension of Pointe-Lévy educational facilities, featuring the construction of a major regional gymnastics center and a state-of-the-art double gymnasium, executed in partnership between the school board and the municipality of Lévis.

title: Huronne-Wendat Recreational Complex
description: Multi-service community center, recreational facility, and covered ice rink structure.
longDescription: Major new construction project for the Huronne-Wendat First Nation, encompassing a state-of-the-art multi-service community hub, a premier recreational facility, and an engineered covered ice rink pavilion.

title: Raymond-Blais Community Hub
meta: Major Renovation & Extension | City of Lévis (2023)
description: Modernization and revitalization of the Raymond-Blais community center and Saint-David Library.
longDescription: Full envelope rehabilitation, structural retrofitting, and roof replacement. Architectural extension including a new main entrance atrium and elevator shaft for universal accessibility. Interior reconfiguration to optimize occupancy flow and programming. Complete modernization of multi-functional spaces, library facilities, and historical archives. Integration of contemporary furniture and designated early-childhood zones, creating a vibrant, light-filled hub for leisure, learning, and community well-being.

title: Saint-Anselme Arena & City Hall Complex
description: Structural expansion of the municipal arena and design of the new city hall pavilion.
longDescription: Complex site planning and feasibility study for the structural expansion of the Saint-Anselme municipal arena, integrated with the construction of a new contemporary city hall pavilion, optimizing administrative and community recreational services.

title: Covered Refrigerated Ice Rink Structures
meta: Municipal Service Pavilions | City of Quebec (2023)
description: Site integration of covered rink structures and prototype design for six municipal parks.
longDescription: Comprehensive technical feasibility study and space program for the construction of covered, refrigerated ice rink pavilions across six (6) parks in the City of Quebec, including the custom architectural design of a prototype service building.

title: Ferland Community Center
description: Feasibility study for a major rehabilitation of the community center, aquatic basin, and change rooms.
longDescription: Detailed structural and architectural feasibility study targeting the full modernization of the Ferland Community Center in Quebec, incorporating aquatic pool compliance and spatial restructuring of athletic changing facilities.
tasks: Production of Master Plan CAD drawings

title: Cégep de Shawinigan Sports Complex
description: Modernization of aquatic facilities, universal accessibility upgrades, and locker room renovation.
longDescription: Comprehensive redesign of the institutional swimming pool facility at Cégep de Shawinigan, originally built in 1972. The mandate focused on bringing the aquatic basin to modern safety standards, building code compliance, restructuring locker rooms into flexible gender-neutral layouts, and integrating specialized pool entry systems for universal accessibility and family use.

title: "Le Chamonix" Architectural Lodge
description: High-end contemporary cabin design in Mont Tourbillon.
longDescription: Design and construction of "Le Chamonix" micro-cabin, situated on the slopes of Mont Tourbillon in Lac-Beauport. The primary architectural objective was to maximize panoramic forest vistas by inverting the traditional layout: placing light-filled living areas on the upper level and private bedrooms on the ground floor. Inspired by traditional Alpine chalets, the design features a warm timber facade centered around twin natural stone chimneys, accented by sleek black steel structural elements for a modern rustic aesthetic.

title: Maracana Exhibition Center
meta: Adaptive Reuse of Industrial Facility (Concept Phase)
description: High-end design proposal converting an industrial site into a premium cultural exhibition hub.
longDescription: Comprehensive interior architecture proposal converting a large-scale existing structure into a premium exposition center, incorporating architectural lighting design, visitor flow planning, custom scenography, and luxury event detailing.

title: ISSAT Higher Institute of Applied Sciences
meta: National Architectural Competition - 1st Prize Winner | Built: 2016-2019
description: Awarded Carthage Architectural Days (JAC) Best Project for Institutional/Civil Buildings.
longDescription: Award-winning project selected as 1st Prize in a national design competition. Led the architectural development and site execution of a multi-disciplinary higher education campus. The design implements passive solar strategies, bioclimatic ventilation, optimized student flow control, and contemporary educational layouts. Recognized with the JAC 2019 Best Civil Building Award.

title: Luxury Waterfront Villa Complex
description: Private family resort featuring seaside villas.
longDescription: Architectural design for a private family compound consisting of 5 luxury villas situated on a prime waterfront site. Optimized for sea views and privacy. (Concept Phase)
video: <iframe width="1920" height="1080" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/LKrNnfumLS4?si=qkmr2nx7FPY3FKB1" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

title: Coke Studio Algeria
description: High-profile broadcast interior architecture and set design.
longDescription: Full interior set design and space planning for the televised musical show Coke Studio Algeria. Successfully built a high-tech broadcast environment combining contemporary aesthetics with traditional North African motifs, satisfying complex acoustics and technical staging requirements.

title: Yakouren Spa Resort
description: Design concept for a mountain spa resort.
longDescription: Comprehensive schematic architectural design for a high-end luxury wellness resort nestled in the forest of Yakouren, focusing on eco-friendly materials and thermal facility layout.

title: Mareth Regional Hospital (100 Beds)
description: Regional hospital complex with integrated bioclimatic systems.
longDescription: Detailed architectural proposal developed for the National Competition of the Mareth Regional Hospital. Design of a modern 100-bed healthcare facility with highly optimized medical ergonomics, specialized sanitary zones, and passive solar control to optimize energy efficiency and patient thermal comfort.

title: Gabès Financial Administration HQ
description: Public administrative complex featuring a high-security GRC custom envelope.
longDescription: Architectural design for the National Competition of the Gabès Finance Ministry Headquarters. The scheme balances high-security banking logistics (vaults and asset management) with a light-filled double-height public atrium, sheltered by a custom-designed perforated GRC external screen.

title: Sbeitla Regional Hospital (120 Beds)
description: Feasibility and design of a regional healthcare facility.
longDescription: Detailed design entry for the National Competition of the Sbeitla Regional Hospital. The architectural layout coordinates emergency rooms, diagnostics, surgery suites, and 120-bed wards along an engineered circulation spine that strictly separates sterile and general traffic flows.

title: Sabra Campus Dining Facility
description: Industrial-scale campus dining hall serving 800 students in Kairouan.
longDescription: Design proposal for the National Competition of the Sabra University Restaurant in Kairouan. The building design integrates a double-height dining hall seating 800, a professional HACCP-compliant food processing facility, and optimized entrances to handle high-density student flows.

title: El Battan Cultural Center
description: Multi-use cultural hub with a 300-seat theater and creative studios.
longDescription: Architectural competition design for the El Battan Cultural Center. A contemporary structure inspired by local regional architecture, housing a 300-seat theater, production backstage facilities, artist studios, and a flexible gallery hall.

title: Sidi Bouzid East Cultural Center
description: Multi-disciplinary arts center for community education.
longDescription: Design entry for the Sidi Bouzid East Cultural Center National Competition. Planned as a local cultural catalyst, it features professional soundproofed music studios, art galleries, a public library, and a modular performance auditorium.

title: Zriba Thermal Spa Resort
description: Modern thermal wellness and spa complex integrated into the mountains.
longDescription: Concept proposal for the Zriba Thermal SPA Resort in Zaghouan. Designed to harmoniously blend with the mountain site, the complex organizes private therapy clinics, mud bath chambers, and a massive glass-covered thermal pool.

title: Borj Cedria Student Housing Tower
description: Innovative biophilic and circular student residential development.
longDescription: Concept design entry for the Borj Cedria Student Housing. The master plan balances high-density high-rise residential towers with circular structures, designed to optimize natural daylighting, natural cross-ventilation, and community integration.

title: Mahdia Maritime Language Campus
description: Seaside educational and residential language village.
longDescription: Comprehensive architectural layout for the National Competition of the Mahdia Language Village. Designed a coastal learning retreat merging classrooms, lecture halls, campus residences, and waterfront amenities configured to withstand marine environmental conditions.
